query:
-- RLA-2: Grammar & Writing (15 questions)
INSERT INTO bridge_academy_practice_questions (topicId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, explanation, difficulty, variationGroup) VALUES
(5, 'Which sentence is grammatically correct?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"She go to school\", \"She goes to school\", \"She going to school\", \"She gone to school\"]', 'She goes to school', 'The verb must agree with the subject: she is third person singular', 'easy', 'topic_5_group_0'),
(5, 'What is the correct plural of child?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"childs\", \"children\", \"childes\", \"childer\"]', 'children', 'Child is an irregular noun; its plural is children', 'easy', 'topic_5_group_0'),
(5, 'Which word is a noun?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Run\", \"Happy\", \"Book\", \"Quickly\"]', 'Book', 'A noun is a person, place, or thing', 'easy', 'topic_5_group_1'),
(5, 'What is the correct form of the verb in: If I _____ you, I would help?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"was\", \"were\", \"am\", \"been\"]', 'were', 'In conditional statements, use were for all subjects', 'hard', 'topic_5_group_1'),
(5, 'Which sentence uses the correct pronoun?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Him and me went to the store\", \"He and I went to the store\", \"Him and I went to the store\", \"He and me went to the store\"]', 'He and I went to the store', 'Use subject pronouns (he, I) for the subject of a sentence', 'medium', 'topic_5_group_2'),
(5, 'What is the correct spelling?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Recieve\", \"Receive\", \"Recieve\", \"Recieve\"]', 'Receive', 'Remember: i before e except after c', 'easy', 'topic_5_group_2'),
(5, 'Which sentence has correct punctuation?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"She said, Hello\", \"She said Hello\", \"She said Hello\", \"She said Hello\"]', 'She said, Hello', 'Commas and periods go inside quotation marks', 'medium', 'topic_5_group_3'),
(5, 'What is a run-on sentence?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A very long sentence\", \"Two independent clauses joined without proper punctuation\", \"A sentence with many adjectives\", \"A sentence that is too complex\"]', 'Two independent clauses joined without proper punctuation', 'A run-on sentence incorrectly joins independent clauses', 'medium', 'topic_5_group_3'),
(5, 'Which word is an adjective?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Quickly\", \"Beautiful\", \"Run\", \"Happily\"]', 'Beautiful', 'An adjective describes a noun', 'easy', 'topic_5_group_4'),
(5, 'What is the correct comparative form of good?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"gooder\", \"better\", \"more good\", \"best\"]', 'better', 'Better is the irregular comparative form of good', 'medium', 'topic_5_group_4'),
(5, 'Which sentence is a fragment?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"The dog ran fast.\", \"Running quickly down the street.\", \"She ate lunch.\", \"They played games.\"]', 'Running quickly down the street.', 'A fragment is an incomplete sentence lacking a subject or verb', 'medium', 'topic_5_group_5'),
(5, 'What is the correct form: Neither the teacher nor the students _____ ready?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"is\", \"are\", \"was\", \"were\"]', 'are', 'With neither...nor, use the verb form that agrees with the nearest subject', 'hard', 'topic_5_group_5'),
(5, 'Which sentence uses active voice?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"The cake was eaten by Sarah.\", \"Sarah ate the cake.\", \"The cake was delicious.\", \"Sarah is eating cakes.\"]', 'Sarah ate the cake.', 'Active voice has the subject performing the action', 'medium', 'topic_5_group_6'),
(5, 'What is a dangling modifier?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A modifier that is too long\", \"A modifier that does not clearly refer to the word it modifies\", \"A modifier at the end of a sentence\", \"A modifier that is repeated\"]', 'A modifier that does not clearly refer to the word it modifies', 'A dangling modifier creates confusion about what it modifies', 'hard', 'topic_5_group_6'),
(5, 'Which sentence has correct subject-verb agreement?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"The group of students are studying.\", \"The group of students is studying.\", \"The students group are studying.\", \"The students group is studying.\"]', 'The group of students is studying.', 'Collective nouns like group take singular verbs', 'hard', 'topic_5_group_7');
